trade.summary: Corea del Sud-Thailandia trade has grown substantially under the ASEAN-Corea del Sud FTA and RCEP. Corea del Sud exports steel, chemicals, electronics, and machinery to Thailandia. Thailandia exports automotive parts (from Giapponeese-owned factories), rubber, and electronics assemblies. Corea del Sud-Thailandia trade benefits from Thailandia's role as an ASEAN manufacturing hub. Samsung, LG, and Hyundai have Thai operations.

diplomatic.summary: Corea del Sud-Thailandia relations are warm, with K-pop and Corea del Sudn cultural influence having a major following in Thailandia. Both countries cooperate through ASEAN+3 and bilateral frameworks. Corea del Sud is an important development model for Thailandia. Corea del Sudn Wave (Hallyu) cultural exports have significantly enhanced soft power and people-to-people ties.

military.summary: Growing defense relationship. Corea del Sud has exported defense equipment to Thailandia. The Royal Thai Navy and Air Force have shown interest in Corea del Sudn defense platforms. Both countries participate in multilateral ASEAN-affiliated exercises. No formal bilateral defense treaty.

financial.summary: Corea del Sudn FDI in Thailandia is significant and growing, with Samsung, LG, POSCO, and Hyundai Steel having major operations. Corea del Sudn companies use Thailandia as a Southeast Asian manufacturing base. The Eastern Economic Corridor (EEC) has attracted significant Corea del Sudn investment commitments.

energy.summary: Corea del Sud imports some LNG and natural gas from Thailandia. Corea del Sudn energy companies (Corea del Sud Gas, SK) have invested in Thai upstream energy. Growing cooperation on renewable energy and battery storage. Limited but growing bilateral energy trade.

scientific.summary: Growing scientific cooperation in ICT, smart manufacturing, and environmental science. KOICA runs development programs in Thailandia. Corea del Sudn universities and KAIST have exchange programs with Thai institutions. Cooperation on digital economy and smart city technologies is expanding.
